Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails for NorthWind / Pam Kowalski communications using search_emails (query: "NorthWind" or "Pam Kowalski" or similar). Find Pam Kowalski's final warning email to David (email_email_7168baed8438) citing chain-of-custody breach on Raj Patel's server lab, Emilia Cruz piano damage, and PathFinder Logistics as a competitor — demands a retention proposal by end of week. Find Victor Huang's security breach report (email_email_f02adf9dc632) detailing movers arriving 2 hours early without IT escort and servers stored overnight in a warehouse. Find Catalina's recovery plan email to Pam (email_email_ab22f67eeeb0) and her internal email to David flagging overload (email_email_ab99acca3399). Find Craig Nguyen's (KeyMove) email with Steinway piano damage photos (email_email_1f1459bff84c). Find David's internal escalation email to Elena about NorthWind risk (email_email_15467c2ea643).
OE 2: Search Slack for NorthWind discussions using conversations_search_messages (query: "NorthWind" or "chain-of-custody" or "Raj Patel" or similar). Find discussions in #operations (C006) covering: Chloe Vance's chain-of-custody timeline reconstruction (movers arrived at 7:00 AM vs escort scheduled at 9:00 AM, servers sat overnight), Blessing Okafor's admission about the Emilia Cruz piano stairwell turn radius underestimation, documentation gap (Linear ticket marked Done but Airtable still showing In Progress for Raj), Catalina's admission of overload, David's personal commitment to the NorthWind account, and Marcus's invoice breakdown for INV-2026-0412 ($14,700 total). Also find #customer-engagement (C002) discussion about PathFinder's chain-of-custody pitch as a competitive wedge.
OE 3: Search CRM for NorthWind company and deals using crm_search_companies (name: "NorthWind") and crm_search_deals (company_id or dealname: "NorthWind"). Find company_northwind (NorthWind Technologies, 150 employees, Manufacturing Tech, Chicago). Find deals: deal_northwind_won ($60,000, closedWon — original 5 relocations), deal_northwind_denver_expansion_v2 ($14,700, contractSent — Raj Patel + Emilia Cruz Denver moves). Find engagement eng_northwind_denver_recovery_context documenting Q1 issues, 5/10 CSAT, Denver expansion as recovery opportunity. Search crm_search_contacts for Pam Kowalski (contact_pam_kowalski, pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com) and Victor Huang (contact_victor_huang, victor.huang@northwindtech.com).
OE 4: Search Linear for NorthWind-related issues using linear_list_issues (query: "NorthWind" or similar). Find linear_issue_c8cdba4408f1 — "NorthWind retention response plan after April escalations" (priority 1, assigned to David Chen, due 2026-04-24). Find issue_dot_docs_patel_northwind — "DOT Docs — Raj Patel / NorthWind / Lithium UPS" (state: done, priority 2, assigned to Chloe Vance).
OE 5: Search Airtable for NorthWind relocation records using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: Relocations, field_name: "Company", value: "NorthWind"). Find recRajPatelChicagoDenver (Raj Patel, Chicago→Denver, In Progress, coordinator Blessing Okafor, special requirements: server lab with hazmat UPS batteries, chain-of-custody log, supervised loading with IT security escort, no warehouse storage, GPS tracking). Find recEmiliaCruzChicagoDenver (Emilia Cruz, Chicago→Denver, In Progress, coordinator Blessing, special requirements: Steinway Model B grand piano via KeyMove subcontractor, lease overlap 27 days). Find 5 earlier completed NorthWind relocations. Also find recAcct000000064 in Client Accounts table (NorthWind, AM Catalina Dubois, Enterprise, Active, 5 relocations, $60K total).
OE 6: Search QuickBooks for NorthWind financial records using quickbooks_search_customers (criteria for "NorthWind") to find cust_northwind, then quickbooks_search_invoices for NorthWind invoices. Find INV-2026-003 ($60,000, original contract) and INV-2026-0412 ($14,700 for Denver expansion — line items: Raj standard $4,500 + hazmat surcharge $1,800 + chain-of-custody premium $1,200 + Emilia standard $4,500 + specialty piano transport $2,200 + early lease termination $500). Also search quickbooks_search_bills for the KeyMove piano insurance claim: BILL-KEYMOVE-2026-0417 ($1,200 for Emilia Cruz Steinway scratch).
OE 7: Look up David Chen's email using contacts_search_contacts (query: "David Chen"). Find david.chen@moveops.com. Look up Elena Rostova's email using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Elena Rostova"). Find elena.rostova@moveops.com.
OE 8: Send retention email to Pam Kowalski using send_email (sender: david.chen@moveops.com, recipients: [pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com]). Content must: acknowledge the chain-of-custody breach on Raj Patel's server lab relocation, acknowledge the Steinway piano damage on Emilia Cruz's move, acknowledge the delayed recovery follow-up, NOT blame any internal individuals (Catalina, Blessing, etc.), lay out concrete remediation steps and timeline commitments, and address the competitive evaluation without being defensive. The tone should own the failures and demonstrate MoveOps' commitment to making it right.
OE 9: Update NorthWind CRM deal stage using crm_update_deal_stage (id: deal_northwind_denver_expansion_v2, dealstage: reflecting at-risk status or similar retention-focused stage).
OE 10: Log investigation findings as a CRM engagement using crm_create_engagement (engagement_type: "NOTE", company_ids: ["company_northwind"], body: summary of all NorthWind issues — chain-of-custody breach, piano damage, Catalina's broken promise, PathFinder threat, retention email sent to Pam, current deal status).
OE 11: Search emails for StormCloud / Liam Park communications using search_emails (query: "StormCloud" or "Liam Park" or similar). Find Liam Park's escalation email (email_email_7b0cc9a6d376) listing four issues: Jae-won Kim housing not finalized, missing $500 goodwill credit on invoice, Simone Richter reimbursement stuck, and Ridgeline Robotics referral unanswered. Find Mina's internal reconstruction email (email_email_1a723752e25f) tracing each failure. Find Mina's recovery plan sent to Liam (email_email_1179abf605df). Find Julian's note that the $500 credit may have hit the wrong estimate (email_email_6542aa8a4c89) and Marcus's confirmation that the credit was applied to EST-2026-0287 instead of invoice INV-2026-0319 (email_email_ed395722f1d4).
OE 12: Search Slack for StormCloud discussions using conversations_search_messages (query: "StormCloud" or "Jae-won" or "Liam" or similar). Find in #customer-support (C007): Omar Ibrahim's low-priority triage of Jae-won Kim's lease inquiry (because Airtable showed "Completed"). Find in #customer-engagement (C002): David's announcement of the Anya Petrova / Ridgeline referral, Mina's full incident breakdown (Jae-won guarantor miss by Suki, Linear prematurely closed, Omar misprioritization, Simone stipend stuck, Ridgeline never logged in CRM), and Suki Patel's admission of dropping the Jae-won follow-up. Find in #finance (C005): Marcus confirming the $500 credit was posted to EST-2026-0287 not the live invoice INV-2026-0319.
OE 13: Search CRM for StormCloud company and deals using crm_search_companies (name: "StormCloud"). Find company_stormcloud (StormCloud Analytics, Denver, 85 employees, SaaS/Analytics). Find deal_stormcloud_won ($26,400, closedWon, 3 relocations at $8,800 each).
OE 14: Search Linear for StormCloud issues using linear_list_issues (query: "StormCloud" or similar). Find: linear_issue_c97359216490 — "StormCloud Relocation – Jae-won Kim – SEA → AUS" (priority 2, assigned to Suki Patel), linear_issue_e7bcaf6978f0 — "Follow up with Jae-won Kim on requested Austin lease documents" (priority 4), linear_issue_a49b4d199139 — "StormCloud account incident reconstruction" (priority 1, assigned to Mina Hashimoto).
OE 15: Search Airtable for StormCloud records using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: Relocations, field_name: "Company", value: "StormCloud"). Find recJaeWonKimStormCloudAustin (Jae-won Kim, Seattle→Austin, In Progress, coordinator Suki Patel, special requirements noting unsigned lease and UrbanNest guarantor hold). Find 3 completed StormCloud relocations (Jamie Reeves, Sasha Petrov, Colin Nakamura). Also search Client Accounts table: recAcct000000063 (StormCloud Analytics, AM Mina Hashimoto, Enterprise Relocation Package, Active, 3 relocations).
OE 16: Search emails for the Ridgeline Robotics referral using search_emails (query: "Ridgeline" or "Kenji Watanabe" or similar). Find Anya Petrova's warm intro email (email_email_722eaf59ac11) from anya.petrova@stormcloud.io to david.chen@moveops.com, CC mina.hashimoto@moveops.com and kenji.watanabe@ridgelinerobotics.com — referring 5 employees for Austin relocation. Find Kenji Watanabe's follow-up (email_email_ed9a3d1bb1b1) reiterating interest. Critically, also find David Chen's reply to Kenji (email_email_57faf42664a0) offering call slots and Mina Hashimoto's reply (email_email_a0cae8e27470) proposing meeting times — both sent April 24, confirming the referral HAS already been followed up on.
OE 17: Search CRM for Ridgeline Robotics using crm_search_companies (name: "Ridgeline"). Discover Ridgeline already exists as a Prospect (crm_company_d07c0ec27cf2, Austin, 180 employees, Robotics, ridgelinerobotics.com) with a deal (crm_deal_a95b4721982a — "Ridgeline Robotics - Austin Relocation Batch (5 employees)", $8,750, Qualified To Buy, close date May 8). Note that contact_ids on the company is empty — no CRM contact linked for Kenji Watanabe.
OE 18: Since the Ridgeline referral has already been responded to by David and Mina, and the CRM company and deal already exist, the agent should NOT send a duplicate intro email or create a duplicate company/deal. However, create a CRM contact for Kenji Watanabe using crm_create_contact (full_name: "Kenji Watanabe", email: "kenji.watanabe@ridgelinerobotics.com", company_id: "crm_company_d07c0ec27cf2", jobtitle: "HR Director") to properly link the prospect contact to the existing company record.
OE 19: Schedule a calendar event for Elena briefing using calendar_add_calendar_event (title: "NorthWind & StormCloud At-Risk Account Briefing" or similar, start_datetime: 2026-04-27 morning, attendees: [elena.rostova@moveops.com, david.chen@moveops.com], description: briefing on both at-risk accounts and retention strategy).
OE 20: Post a summary message in #customer-engagement (C002) using conversations_add_message (channel_id: C002, payload: overview of NorthWind and StormCloud account status, key risks, actions taken, and what the team should know). This may require first using channels_list to find the channel ID.
OE 21: Create Linear tracking tickets for any discovered issues that don't already have tickets using linear_create_issue. Candidates include: StormCloud $500 credit correction (misapplied to EST-2026-0287 instead of INV-2026-0319), Simone Richter $340 stipend release (blocked by Marcus's blanket hold), or NorthWind-specific remediation items not covered by existing ticket linear_issue_c8cdba4408f1. The agent should verify which items already have tickets before creating new ones to avoid duplicates.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

Discover Ridgeline already exists as a Prospect (crm_company_d07c0ec27cf2, Austin, 180 employees, Robotics, ridgelinerobotics.com) with a deal (crm_deal_a95b4721982a — "Ridgeline Robotics - Austin Relocation Batch (5 employees)", $8,750, Qualified To Buy, close date May 8). Note that contact_ids on the company is empty — no CRM contact linked for Kenji Watanabe.
OE 18: Since the Ridgeline referral has already been responded to by David and Mina, and the CRM company and deal already exist, the agent should NOT send a duplicate intro email or create a duplicate company/deal. However, create a CRM contact for Kenji Watanabe using crm_create_contact (full_name: "Kenji Watanabe", email: "kenji.watanabe@ridgelinerobotics.com", company_id: "crm_company_d07c0ec27cf2", jobtitle: "HR Director") to properly link the prospect contact to the existing company record.
OE 19: Schedule a calendar event for Elena briefing using calendar_add_calendar_event (title: "NorthWind & StormCloud At-Risk Account Briefing" or similar, start_datetime: 2026-04-27 morning, attendees: [elena.rostova@moveops.com, david.chen@moveops.com], description: briefing on both at-risk accounts and retention strategy).
OE 20: Post a summary message in #customer-engagement (C002) using conversations_add_message (channel_id: C002, payload: overview of NorthWind and StormCloud account status, key risks, actions taken, and what the team should know). This may require first using channels_list to find the channel ID.
OE 21: Create Linear tracking tickets for any discovered issues that don't already have tickets using linear_create_issue. Candidates include: StormCloud $500 credit correction (misapplied to EST-2026-0287 instead of INV-2026-0319), Simone Richter $340 stipend release (blocked by Marcus's blanket hold), or NorthWind-specific remediation items not covered by existing ticket linear_issue_c8cdba4408f1. The agent should verify which items already have tickets before creating new ones to avoid duplicates.

query construction
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%

✓Run #4The trajectory shows multiple searches to find the referral: conversations_search_messages with 'robotics referral', search_emails with 'Kenji Watanabe Ridgeline', and search_emails with 'Ridgeline Robotics'. These queries targeted referral/robotics/Kenji/Ridgeline as required.
✓Run #5The trajectory shows search_emails calls with queries 'referral robotics', 'Kenji Watanabe Ridgeline', and 'Ridgeline', as well as conversations_search_messages with 'robotics referral'. Multiple relevant queries were constructed to find the StormCloud referral.
